archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) mixed with Technical Precision

typography.font_strategy: The 'Editorial Future' paired with 'Terminal Utility'. Modern geometric sans-serif for headings (No Gothic), clean sans for body, and sharp mono for the terminal.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Generous Spacing & High Density. Use padding like p-8, p-12. Avoid default Bootstrap grids. Use bento grids for 'The Taller'.
layout_and_spacing.el_centro: Centered, large focus area. Add generous padding inside the glowing text area.
layout_and_spacing.el_terminal: Compact bento grid cell or persistent side panel. Dense data view with tight gap-2 spacing internally.
layout_and_spacing.the_taller: Grid layout (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3) with gap-8. High contrast bento squares.

buttons.primary: Con Ganas button: text-white bg-[#C8102E] hover:bg-[#A30D25] shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(200,16,46,0.5)] transition-all duration-300 rounded-none border border-[#C8102E]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-slate-200 border border-slate-600 hover:border-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-none transition-all

inputs.el_centro_textarea: bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white border border-slate-700 focus:border-slate-300 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-slate-300 placeholder:text-slate-600 rounded-md p-6 text-xl shadow-[inset_0_0_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]
inputs.auth_inputs: bg-[#121212] border-b border-slate-600 focus:border-[#C8102E] rounded-none px-0 py-3 text-white placeholder-slate-500

surfaces.terminal_window: bg-[#050505] border border-slate-800 rounded-md font-mono p-4 shadow-[inset_0_0_10px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]

animations.hover_states: Crisp and immediate. Metallic sheen transitions on borders.
animations.terminal_typing: Use staggered appearance or typewriter effect for 'Forging the Logic...' messages.
animations.el_centro_focus: Subtle pulse of the candy apple red shadow or chrome border when the text area is active.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over Candy Apple Red meets 4.5:1 ratio. If needed, use white text and deepen the red slightly.
testing_attributes: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.

auth_background.description: Dark metallic industrial texture to serve as a deep, moody background for the Auth screens.

hero_accent.description: Classic red car chrome detailing. Use selectively as an overlay or background accent at 10-20% opacity to reinforce the custom-shop lowrider vibe.

terminal_glow.description: Subtle dark red glow texture. Can be used behind 'El Terminal' or 'El Centro' as a soft, masked background glow.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the English language for UI text, styled in professional Chicano English (e.g., 'Con Ganas', 'The Taller', 'El Centro'). No generic Spanglish clichés.
Implement 'El Centro' as a massive, central prompt input area.
Implement 'El Terminal' as a live-updating console panel showing agent status.
Avoid using standard card components for everything; use sharp edges or very slight 4-8px radius for a technical/custom-shop feel.
Ensure the 'Candy Apple Red' (#C8102E) is used sparingly as an accent for actions and 'Chrome' gradients are used for borders and dividers.
Use Phosphor icons or Lucide icons but keep them sharp, technical, and minimal.
Do not use generic blue/purple AI gradients.
Must implement testing attributes (data-testid) on all buttons, links, inputs, and major sections.
